Hello World

I am Andres, web developer.

Specialized in the development of RESTs APIs with Ruby on Rails. I have done different projects, both back-end and full-stack. I have been in charge from application development to its deployment in the cloud (AWS). I like to face new challenges, learn and solve problems in the best possible way.

#Rails #Ruby #Python #AWS
